reviews.review_description:
I really, really want to like this game. The design is clean and minimal, the music is nice, and the levels are well thought out. But there are some glitches that I simply can't overlook: gate triggers that disappear but continue to function, and locks that reappear out of nowhere after I've already unlocked them (and died). For a game with such simple design, one would expect these types of bugs to be ironed out.

Also, if you mess up by using the "wrong" key for a specific lock, you can't start that room or puzzle over - instead you must reset the level entirely.

One question: what is the difference between green and yellow checkpoints?
Great relaxing game. Sometimes also challenging a bit. Somebody mentioned glitches, but I didn't notice any at all. I am now finishing the last level.

This game is an absolute masterpiece. If you want to experience a creative puzzle game that challenges you without the frustration of poor development decisions, this is it. Amazingly beautiful music in a relaxing environment. Don't let the simplicity fool you, Linelight is worth at least 5 times more than its price tag. Easily one of my top 5 favorite games of all times (across all game consoles), and it's not #5. I can't express enough how awesome this game is. Pure genius! BUY IT!

Linelight is a brilliant example of how simple lines can create an incredibly addictive and smart experience. The progression is flawless: you constantly discover new mechanics and feel your "brain power" growing with every world. The music and atmosphere are a total delight — it’s like a deep dive into an electronic zen.
Yes, there are some "chase" moments and red lines that can catch you, which adds a bit of pressure when you just want to think. But honestly, they aren't that annoying once you catch the rhythm.
The only real problem with this game is that it’s too good, and it ends too fast! I finished it and immediately wanted 100 or even 500 more levels. If you love logic puzzles and stylish visuals, get this game without hesitation. Just be prepared that you’ll swallow it whole and be begging for more! 5/5 stars.

This puzzle game is a masterpiece. So easy to learn how to play; new game mechanics are introduced in a gradual and intuitive fashion. As you master the puzzles you are rewarded with simply genius moments making the gameplay magical.

It’s very difficult to describe this game; you basically travel along lines and meet other coloured lines… I know… how would that work? But it really does!

I never thought I would be tearing up at the end by a bunch of little lines. Perhaps I’m just tired… I won’t leave spoilers but to be honest I wouldn’t be able to explain what happens anyway and make any sense.

Well done to the creator!
This game will keep you busy and certainly get you thinking.

I just wish there was an angle to play between straight-up and directly forward. Maybe a slider to select the angle. That would be nice. Otherwise, it's nice to just sit down and feel like a genius as you solve some of the most visually satisfying puzzles ever.

The game is well-designed, but should allow access to all six levels. I was stuck on level 3 and consulted the developer and YouTube to figure out how to pass it. This was very helpful and I was able to get pass the level. Puzzle games stimulate critical and creative thinking skills.

developer_response.body: For anyone else who wishes to jump around the game, you can! Hold down both thumbsticks for 5 seconds to unlock DEBUG controls. Then, click either thumbstick to open/close the debug menu. Please use responsibly. :)

reviews.review_description: I LOVE that you can lay down and play this game.... the puzzles are challenging enough to make you think but not so hard that it becomes frustrating. Cant wait for more!

Immersive, beautiful experience. Would be 5 stars if not for the controls: the dot simply moves too fast, the thumbsticks are too imprecise. A slider in the options menu to adjust the speed could easily solve the problem.
Bought this game for the family. Is there a way to restart a new game so a different person can play? When I select quit it closes. Rersume the existing game seems to be the only option.

developer_response.body:
Yep! There are 3 save slots you can choose from. Click “Options” in the main menu, then “Save Slots”!
Edit: Did you get to open a different save slot yet?

reviews.review_description:
First off I like the gameplay. At times it is nice to just relax, the music is nice, and do some thinking without too much going on. Played it for half a hour and don't really see myself returning to it much in the future.

The puzzles are good and get you thinking at times, but it kind of gets boring although new things are introduced into the gameplay. 

But from my standpoint it would be better suited as a flat game(I know it has been for a few years) rather then VR, which brings nothing in VR that is worth talking about.
Just don't see the point of wearing a headset to play this for any length of time.  Flat then I would play it more as a quick time filler.

reviews.review_title: 25% off This is a great puzzler!
reviews.review_description:
Feel free to use my referral for 25% off! https://bit.ly/linelight

I've played so many hours of this on my phone and it's somehow even better in VR!

"If you like puzzle games I don't think you can go wrong with this one!

I took a chance on this game because I saw I could return it if I didn't like it.

There's no way I'm returning it. This game is simplicity and complexity all at the same time. It's beautiful, easy to understand, easy to play, difficult to master. The game play and graphics and sound rival any puzzle game on the market. Hands down. I was instantly addicted. Ten out of ten, will play again. And again.

reviews.review_title: Lie down before playing this game
reviews.review_description:
I played this game on mobile years ago and was able to playtest this VR version before it came out.
Much like the original, this is a really relaxing game with some solid mechanics and puzzles. For a VR game it is pretty flat, but the fact that you can lie down in bed and stare at the ceiling while going through all the levels makes you quickly forget that. That feature really makes this one of the most relaxing games on the Quest :)
Relaxing, clever and fun puzzle game! Highly recommend!
This game is so simple and good. I lost all sense of time and just kept playing

Excellent, highly addictive puzzle game!!
Recommended!!

reviews.review_title: I love this game so much.
reviews.review_description:
There’s nothing I can say that would illuminate this game more so than all of the other 5 star reviews. 

What I want to know is,

Developers, will there be updates, extra levels, anything? I’ll take extra music tracks too.

That’s right, this game has incredible music.

But seriously, I’d appreciate more levels and will gladly pay for them.

I have to say, this game is needed for people like me with mental disorders. It focuses and calms me at the same time. 

Please bring more.

🙏🙏🙏

I hope this is not spamming you as it’s on the bottom of the review, but should you find this helpful, please consider using my lnk below. Thank you! 🙏❤️🙏✌️ it’s %25 off. Just change the comma to period and backspace everything.

reviews.review_title: New Mixed Reality Update is Awesome
reviews.review_description: The new mixed reality update is awesome together with the hand tracking. Makes you feel like a magician. My only comment is if developers can slow down the speed of the white line and other lines you are controlling particularly with hand tracking. It is super fast.

developer_response.body: Awesome, glad you like the update! I put a lot of work into it. :) When you say "slow down"-- do you mean make your player-character line move more slowly? Are you talking about just slowing down evvverything? Or do you mean more like the finger moves the player line too quickly, as in it's too sensitive? Let me know at brett@mydogzorro.com, and I'll see what I can do!
